summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shadow Wolves Productions website expansion - About/Manifesto page, Work With Us (Submissions), Investor Portal, and Newsletter. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new pages (About, WorkWithUs, InvestorLogin, InvestorPortal) properly use Cinzel font for headings as specified
Form validation implemented correctly on both frontend and backend (logline 300 char limit, message 500 char limit)
Investor Portal has both password and access code authentication options working
Newsletter subscription on Contact page properly connected to backend API
Admin Dashboard has all required tabs: Films, The Armory, The Den, Submissions, Investors
Investors admin tab has all sub-tabs: Settings, Access Codes, Slate Projects, Documents, Inquiries
Footer includes hidden Investor Portal link as specified
Header navigation updated with About and Work With Us links
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed submissions and investor inquiries for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major expansion tested: About/Manifesto page, Work With Us (Submissions system), Investor Portal (password protected with 6 sections), Newsletter subscription. All APIs working. Email notifications via Resend are implemented but require RESEND_API_KEY in .env to function (currently skipped silently).

details: All sections visible: What We Do, What We Believe, What We Don't Do
Form displays all required fields (name, email, role, submission type, genres, project stage, logline, external link, message)
Genre selection works with toggle buttons
Form validation works (required fields, character limits)
Development Slate section shows projects (empty if none added)
Investment Model section displays investment options
Documents section shows downloadable files (empty if none added)
Expression of Interest form works and creates inquiry
Submissions tab visible in admin dashboard
Settings sub-tab shows portal enabled toggle and global password
Access Codes sub-tab available for managing investor credentials
Slate Projects sub-tab available for managing development slate
Documents sub-tab available for managing investor documents
Inquiries sub-tab shows submitted expressions of interest
Newsletter form on Contact page ('Join the Pack' section)
Email input and Subscribe button work
Success message 'You're in. Welcome to the pack.' displays
Header includes Work With Us link
Footer includes Investor Portal link (hidden/subtle styling)

mocked_apis.resend_email: Email notifications via Resend are implemented but require RESEND_API_KEY in .env. Without the key, emails are skipped silently. This is expected behavior.
